meaning: n.韬唤,鍦颁綅,鎯呭舰,鐘跺喌
examples: Exotic pets are the latest status symbol.
The ads helped Nike to achieve iconic status.
Desire for status can be a powerful motivator.
Well, its competitors have a complaint: that its tax-exempt status gives it an unfair advantage.
Citizenship has been an essentially passive legal status involving few demands beyond obeying the law.
